'''wajono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graeserite|graeserite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graeserite|graeserite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wajono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjeneth|wæjeneth]] || [[word:wæjenej|wæjenej]] || [[word:wæjenesh|wæjenesh]] || [[word:wæjene|wæjene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajojonoth|wajojonoth]] || [[word:wajojonoj|wajojonoj]] || [[word:wajojonosh|wajojonosh]] || [[word:wajojono|wajojono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajonoth|wajonoth]] || [[word:wajonoj|wajonoj]] || [[word:wajonosh|wajonosh]] || [[word:wajono|wajono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajofnoth|wajofnoth]] || [[word:wajofnoj|wajofnoj]] || [[word:wajofnosh|wajofnosh]] || [[word:wajofnof|wajofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajonotho|wajonotho]] || [[word:wajonojo|wajonojo]] || [[word:wajonosho|wajonosho]] || [[word:wajonoko|wajonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajonoth|wajonoth]] || [[word:wajonoj|wajonoj]] || [[word:wajonosh|wajonosh]] || [[word:wajono|wajono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajonothol|wajonothol]] || [[word:wajonojol|wajonojol]] || [[word:wajonoshol|wajonoshol]] || [[word:wajonokol|wajonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajonothotho|wajonothotho]] || [[word:wajonojojo|wajonojojo]] || [[word:wajonoshosho|wajonoshosho]] || [[word:wajonoko|wajonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajonothon|wajonothon]] || [[word:wajonojon|wajonojon]] || [[word:wajonoshon|wajonoshon]] || [[word:wajonokon|wajonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajonothoro|wajonothoro]] || [[word:wajonojoro|wajonojoro]] || [[word:wajonoshoro|wajonoshoro]] || [[word:wajonokoro|wajonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
